content.en:
Although Ye Tian's replica body was sealed, it still poked out a trace of perception and felt the surrounding environment.

"Don't perceive it, there is nothing else here except for the low-quality first-order Supreme Dao Rule item, the Abyss Skull Stone!"

A patriarch said.

Abyss Skullstone!

Ye Tian quickly sensed it as well, there was actually a pile of abyssal skull stones there, piled up there, as if skulls were piled up together, but in fact they were stones similar to skulls.

"So many first-order supreme rule items!"

Ye Tian was excited.

If he had obtained so many first-order supreme path rule items, wouldn't he be able to comprehend the first-order supreme path rule to the ten-percent perfection realm?

But the trouble now is that the Abyss Ten Thousand Skeletons are too powerful, and he is instantly sealed, except for the first patriarch who comes over and has some hope, the other patriarchs are all sent to death.

"Do you have a way to get out of trouble?"

Ye Tian asked these elders and the Demon Venerable.

"I can't get out of trouble!" one of the patriarchs replied: "If you weren't sealed, we would wake up temporarily, otherwise we would all fall into a deep sleep, after all, it's too boring, if we don't fall asleep, we will all go crazy!"

"We are the only ones who are sealed here, could it be that other legendary bitter beasts will not be sealed when they enter here?"

Ye Tian asked this question.

If he wouldn't be sealed, he was going to copy the body of a legendary bitter beast and infiltrate here.

An elder said: "The most powerful means of this legendary bitter beast is sealing, if you remove the sealing means, his strength is not strong, and we are really not afraid of it." The reason why it seals us is also because it is not sure to kill us. Ordinary legends say that when the bitter beast enters here, it will be killed directly. And the mighty Legendary Bitter Beast will not really enter its territory! Moreover, in these long years, there is no Legendary Bitter Beast entering here to seek death!"

"I see!"

Ye Tian felt that it was a little difficult.

There are so many first-order supreme rule items, he is reluctant to give up!

After talking again and again, Ye Tian was never able to obtain useful information.

Not long after, these elders and Demon Venerables fell into a deep sleep one after another, and they didn't respond even when Ye Tian called.

Subsequently.

After calculating again and again, Ye Tian felt that there was only one way with a high probability of being feasible.

That is to study the sealing ability of the Abyss Ten Thousand Skulls to study it, so as to create a supreme Dao divine power that can resist the sealing ability of the Abyss Ten Thousand Skulls, and resist it a little, so as to delay a little time and prepare for other copying bodies to snatch the first sequence of Supreme Dao rule items.

In this way, there may be hope to snatch those Abyssal Skeleton Stones.

"Then start researching!"

He is in the process of being sealed, and for these sealing abilities, he naturally has enough research ability.

It's just that the other patriarch demon venerables have been sealed, even if they want to study, they can't actually operate it!

But Ye Tian's other copy bodies are free, and they can actually operate them, so as to study the sealing ability little by little.

And just like that, the long years passed.

10,000 Solstice Era!

100,000 Solstices!

Millions to the Dao Era!

Gradually, Ye Tian studied the sealing ability for more than two million years in the Dao Era, and finally studied a little mystery on this day, and successfully created a first-order Dao Divine Power.

This first-order Dao Divine Power, there is a high probability that it can last for a while, and it will be sealed later, at least it can be delayed for a little time.

"You can try it!"

this day.

Ye Tian's two replica bodies entered the Legendary Sea of Bitterness and went to the Abyss Ten Thousand Skulls here.

Upon arrival, the two replica bodies separated.

One of the replicas broke into the territory of the Abyss Ten Thousand Skeletons.

Rumble!!!

The Abyss Ten Thousand Skulls sensed Ye Tian's arrival, and they were directly furious, and they used their own sealing techniques!

At this time, Ye Tian mobilized the first sequence of supreme dao rules and cast the first sequence supreme dao divine power that he had created over the past few years—the anti-sealing supreme dao technique.

In an instant, the first sequence of supreme dao rules formed a special enchantment, enveloping Ye Tian.

And the sealing power of the Abyss Ten Thousand Skulls was blocked by this special enchantment, even if the enchantment was about to collapse, but at least it was blocked.

The other side.

Ye Tian's copy body quickly shuttled, came to the bottom of the Legendary Bitter Sea, and went straight to those abyssal skeleton stones.

Then.

This abyssal skull sensed it, and was immediately furious, and was about to return.

And Ye Tian's copy body made a move, using the first sequence of Supreme Dao Rule Divine Power to attack the Abyss Ten Thousand Skulls, and sure enough, the Abyss Ten Thousand Skulls stopped moving, and it was ready to kill Ye Tian's copy body first.

The plan is half the battle!

The next moment later, Ye Tian had already come to the Abyss Skull Stone.

Then.

Those elders and Demon Venerables woke up again, and when they saw Ye Tian, they were shocked.

"Another Ye Tian?"

"I'll go, you actually have a clone!"

"Get us out!"

And Ye Tian naturally ignored them, he directly took away those abyssal skeleton stones, and then quickly fled, because his other copy body could no longer hold on.

At the moment when Ye Tian fled, the copy body could no longer hold on, and the anti-sealing until the Dao technique was broken, and the sealing technique of the Abyss Ten Thousand Skulls enveloped Ye Tian, completely sealing it into a statue and sleeping at the bottom of the sea.

But Ye Tian directly lifted the two sealed copy bodies.

Click!

The two statues directly disintegrated, which made the Abyss Ten Thousand Skulls stunned for a moment.

Immediately after, it began to hunt down the replica body that Ye Tian had escaped.

However, it was too late to chase it down by this time.

The attack power and speed of the Abyss Ten Thousand Skulls were not very high, so it didn't catch up with Ye Tian for a while, and it didn't chase far before returning.

It's just because it only has such a strong strength in its own territory, so naturally it won't leave its own territory.

......

Legend has it that somewhere in the bitter sea.

Ye Tian stopped.

"The Abyss Ten Thousand Skulls didn't continue to chase and kill, and sure enough, it won't chase out of its own territory!"

Ye Tian breathed a sigh of relief, and immediately became excited.

So many first-order Supreme Dao rule items are now his, and his harvest is unimaginable!

Then, Ye Tian returned to the outside world and returned to the human realm.

Only after going back will he be truly at ease!
